requirement_topic.en: IMANOR Conformity — NM Mark and Import Requirements

summary.en: IMANOR (Institut Marocain de Normalisation) is the Moroccan standards body responsible for developing NM (Norme Marocaine) standards, largely mirroring IEC and EN standards. For regulated product categories, an IMANOR conformity mark or equivalent CE DoC (accepted via Morocco-EU Advanced Status) is required before import and sale in Morocco. Industrial three-phase AC motors are covered under NM IEC 60034 series standards. Importers of Chinese motors must present either IMANOR-certified conformity evidence or a valid CE DoC at Moroccan customs. The applicable conformity route (NM mark vs CE DoC) depends on the specific product classification — importers should confirm with IMANOR and Moroccan customs authority (ADII) before shipment.
summary.zh: IMANOR（摩洛哥标准化研究院）是负责制定NM（摩洛哥标准）的摩洛哥标准机构，NM标准主要参照IEC和EN标准。对于受监管的产品类别，在摩洛哥进口和销售前须提供IMANOR合格标志或等效CE符合性声明（通过摩洛哥-欧盟高级地位接受）。工业三相交流电动机受NM IEC 60034系列标准覆盖。中国电动机进口商须在摩洛哥海关提交IMANOR认证的合规证明或有效CE符合性声明。适用的合规路径（NM标志与CE符合性声明）取决于具体产品分类——进口商在出货前应向IMANOR和摩洛哥海关（ADII）确认。
summary.zht: IMANOR（摩洛哥標準化研究院）是負責制定NM（摩洛哥標準）的摩洛哥標準機構，NM標準主要參照IEC和EN標準。對於受監管的產品類別，在摩洛哥進口和銷售前須提供IMANOR合格標誌或等效CE符合性聲明（通過摩洛哥-歐盟高級地位接受）。工業三相交流電動機受NM IEC 60034系列標準覆蓋。中國電動機進口商須在摩洛哥海關提交IMANOR認證的合規證明或有效CE符合性聲明。適用的合規路徑（NM標誌與CE符合性聲明）取決於具體產品分類——進口商在出貨前應向IMANOR和摩洛哥海關（ADII）確認。

standards_or_laws: NM IEC 60034 series (IMANOR adoption of IEC 60034 for rotating electrical machines)
ADII — Administration des Douanes et Impots Indirects (Moroccan customs)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) and GB 18613-2020 for domestic motor market requirements. CCC covers some low-voltage product categories. Neither CCC nor GB standard certificates provide a recognised conformity route for Moroccan import. Chinese manufacturers targeting Morocco must obtain CE marking or IMANOR-specific conformity evidence. There is no bilateral China-Morocco mutual recognition arrangement for motor conformity.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）和GB 18613-2020作为国内电机市场要求。CCC涵盖部分低压产品类别。CCC及GB标准证书均不为摩洛哥进口提供被认可的合规路径。面向摩洛哥市场的中国制造商须获取CE标志或IMANOR专项合规证明。中摩之间没有关于电机合规的双边互认安排。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）和GB 18613-2020作為國內電機市場要求。CCC涵蓋部分低壓產品類別。CCC及GB標準證書均不為摩洛哥進口提供被認可的合規路徑。面向摩洛哥市場的中國製造商須獲取CE標誌或IMANOR專項合規證明。中摩之間沒有關於電機合規的雙邊互認安排。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 755-2019 (IEC 60034-1 equivalent — domestic CN market only)
CCC (domestic CN market only — not recognised in Morocco)

gap.en: Chinese motor documentation (GB standards, CCC) has no recognised pathway at Moroccan customs. The conformity gap is structural: Chinese exporters must obtain either (a) CE marking for LVD and Ecodesign and present a valid CE DoC leveraging Morocco-EU Advanced Status, or (b) IMANOR-specific conformity assessment. No shortcut via CCC exists. Moroccan customs (ADII) may detain shipments without appropriate conformity documentation.
gap.zh: 中国电动机文件（GB标准、CCC）在摩洛哥海关没有被认可的路径。合规差距属于结构性问题：中国出口商须获取（a）LVD和生态设计CE标志并提交有效CE符合性声明（借助摩洛哥-欧盟高级地位），或（b）IMANOR专项合格评定。不存在通过CCC的捷径。缺乏适当合规文件的货物可能被摩洛哥海关（ADII）扣押。
gap.zht: 中國電動機文件（GB標準、CCC）在摩洛哥海關沒有被認可的路徑。合規差距屬於結構性問題：中國出口商須獲取（a）LVD和生態設計CE標誌並提交有效CE符合性聲明（借助摩洛哥-歐盟高級地位），或（b）IMANOR專項合格評定。不存在通過CCC的捷徑。缺乏適當合規文件的貨物可能被摩洛哥海關（ADII）扣押。

mandatory_status.target: IMANOR conformity or CE DoC required for market access; CCC not recognised; confirm specific product classification with IMANOR and ADII
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable to export — domestic CN certification (CCC, GB) provides no recognised route for Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor exporters targeting Morocco must ensure either CE marking (LVD + Ecodesign DoC) or IMANOR conformity assessment before shipment. CCC is not a recognised route. Shipments without appropriate conformity documentation risk customs detention by ADII. Confirm the specific conformity pathway with IMANOR and a qualified Moroccan customs agent before export. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向摩洛哥市场的中国电动机出口商，在出货前须确保已获取CE标志（LVD + 生态设计符合性声明）或IMANOR合格评定。CCC不是被认可的路径。缺乏适当合规文件的货物面临被ADII海关扣押的风险。出口前应向IMANOR和摩洛哥合格报关代理确认具体合规路径。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向摩洛哥市場的中國電動機出口商，在出貨前須確保已獲取CE標誌（LVD + 生態設計符合性聲明）或IMANOR合格評定。CCC不是被認可的路徑。缺乏適當合規文件的貨物面臨被ADII海關扣押的風險。出口前應向IMANOR和摩洛哥合格報關代理確認具體合規路徑。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Moroccan Responsible Economic Operator and Importer Obligations
requirement_topic.zh: 摩洛哥责任经济经营者与进口商义务
requirement_topic.zht: 摩洛哥責任經濟經營者與進口商義務

summary.en: Moroccan import regulations require a locally registered importer or distributor to take responsibility for products placed on the Moroccan market. While Morocco does not have an exact statutory equivalent to the EU Authorised Representative concept under Regulation (EU) 2019/1020, importers of industrial equipment must comply with Moroccan customs and trade regulations administered by ADII, and are responsible for presenting conformity documentation at the border. For regulated product categories, the importer may need to register with IMANOR or present an approved local distributor/agent arrangement. Chinese exporters selling directly to Moroccan end-users should ensure a locally responsible party is identified.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥进口法规要求在当地注册的进口商或经销商对投放摩洛哥市场的产品承担责任。虽然摩洛哥没有与欧盟法规(EU) 2019/1020下的欧盟授权代表完全对应的法定概念，但工业设备进口商须遵守由ADII管理的摩洛哥海关和贸易法规，并负责在边境提交合规文件。对于受监管的产品类别，进口商可能需要在IMANOR注册或提供经批准的当地经销商/代理安排。直接向摩洛哥终端用户销售的中国出口商应确保已确定当地责任方。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥進口法規要求在當地登記的進口商或經銷商對投放摩洛哥市場的產品承擔責任。雖然摩洛哥沒有與歐盟法規(EU) 2019/1020下的歐盟授權代表完全對應的法定概念，但工業設備進口商須遵守由ADII管理的摩洛哥海關和貿易法規，並負責在邊境提交合規文件。對於受監管的產品類別，進口商可能需要在IMANOR登記或提供經批准的當地經銷商/代理安排。直接向摩洛哥終端用戶銷售的中國出口商應確保已確定當地責任方。

standards_or_laws: ADII — Administration des Douanes et Impots Indirects (Moroccan customs and import regulations)
IMANOR importer/distributor registration requirements (verify current requirements)

summary.en: China has no outbound equivalent to a Moroccan responsible importer concept. Chinese exporters rely on their Moroccan trading partner (distributor or importer) to fulfil local market-entry obligations. CCC certificate holders are responsible parties for the Chinese domestic market only — this role does not extend to Moroccan market accountability. No China-Morocco bilateral agreement creates regulatory equivalence for this role.
summary.zh: 中国没有对应摩洛哥责任进口商概念的出口对等机制。中国出口商依赖摩洛哥贸易伙伴（经销商或进口商）履行当地市场准入义务。CCC证书持有人仅对中国国内市场负责——该角色不延伸至摩洛哥市场的法律责任。中摩之间没有为该角色建立监管等效的双边协议。
summary.zht: 中國沒有對應摩洛哥責任進口商概念的出口對等機制。中國出口商依賴摩洛哥貿易夥伴（經銷商或進口商）履行當地市場准入義務。CCC證書持有人僅對中國國內市場負責——該角色不延伸至摩洛哥市場的法律責任。中摩之間沒有為該角色建立監管等效的雙邊協議。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification — domestic CN market only, not recognised in Morocco)

gap.en: Chinese motor exporters selling directly to Moroccan end-users must ensure a Moroccan-registered importer or distributor is in place to handle customs clearance, present conformity documents, and assume local market responsibility. Selling directly without a local responsible party creates legal and customs risk. This is a structural gap requiring a contractual arrangement with a Moroccan entity, not merely a technical fix.
gap.zh: 直接向摩洛哥终端用户销售的中国电动机出口商，须确保在当地有摩洛哥注册的进口商或经销商负责清关、提交合规文件并承担当地市场责任。在没有当地责任方的情况下直接销售会产生法律和海关风险。这是一个结构性差距，需要与摩洛哥实体签订合同安排，而非单纯的技术合规。
gap.zht: 直接向摩洛哥終端用戶銷售的中國電動機出口商，須確保在當地有摩洛哥登記的進口商或經銷商負責清關、提交合規文件並承擔當地市場責任。在沒有當地責任方的情況下直接銷售會產生法律和海關風險。這是一個結構性差距，需要與摩洛哥實體簽訂合同安排，而非單純的技術合規。

mandatory_status.target: Moroccan-registered importer/distributor required for customs clearance and market responsibility; verify specific IMANOR registration requirements for the product category
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no outbound CN equivalent; compliance is the importer's responsibility under Moroccan law

source.publisher: ADII — Administration des Douanes et Impots Indirects (Morocco customs)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor exporters must ensure a Moroccan-registered importer or distributor is contractually in place before shipment to handle customs, conformity documentation presentation, and local market obligations. Selling directly without a local responsible party risks customs refusal and legal liability in Morocco. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电动机出口商在出货前须确保已签约摩洛哥注册的进口商或经销商，负责海关清关、合规文件提交及当地市场义务。在没有当地责任方的情况下直接销售，存在摩洛哥海关拒绝放行和法律责任风险。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電動機出口商在出貨前須確保已簽約摩洛哥登記的進口商或經銷商，負責海關清關、合規文件提交及當地市場義務。在沒有當地責任方的情況下直接銷售，存在摩洛哥海關拒絕放行和法律責任風險。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Labelling and Technical Documentation — NM IEC 60034-1 and IMANOR
requirement_topic.zh: 标签与技术文件——NM IEC 60034-1与IMANOR
requirement_topic.zht: 標籤與技術文件——NM IEC 60034-1與IMANOR

summary.en: Motors sold in Morocco must carry nameplates and technical documentation conforming to NM IEC 60034-1 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) requirements, including rated voltage (400 V for Morocco grid), frequency (50 Hz), power, efficiency class, IP protection, and cooling class. Documentation may be required in French or Arabic (Morocco's official commercial languages) for customs and end-user use. Where CE DoC is the conformity route, the DoC should reference the NM IEC 60034 standards where Morocco-specific compliance is asserted, or at minimum reference the IEC/EN equivalents. Efficiency class information (IE code per NM IEC 60034-30-1) should appear on the nameplate.
summary.zh: 在摩洛哥销售的电动机须符合NM IEC 60034-1（等同IEC 60034-1）要求，铭牌和技术文件须包括额定电压（摩洛哥电网400 V）、频率（50 Hz）、功率、效率等级、IP防护等级和冷却方式。海关及终端用户使用的文件可能须提供法语或阿拉伯语版本（摩洛哥官方商业语言）。当CE符合性声明为合规路径时，符合性声明应引用NM IEC 60034标准（如主张摩洛哥专项合规），或至少引用IEC/EN等效标准。铭牌上应标注效率等级信息（按NM IEC 60034-30-1的IE代码）。
summary.zht: 在摩洛哥銷售的電動機須符合NM IEC 60034-1（等同IEC 60034-1）要求，銘牌和技術文件須包括額定電壓（摩洛哥電網400 V）、頻率（50 Hz）、功率、效率等級、IP防護等級和冷卻方式。海關及終端用戶使用的文件可能須提供法語或阿拉伯語版本（摩洛哥官方商業語言）。當CE符合性聲明為合規路徑時，符合性聲明應引用NM IEC 60034標準（如主張摩洛哥專項合規），或至少引用IEC/EN等效標準。銘牌上應標注效率等級信息（按NM IEC 60034-30-1的IE代碼）。

standards_or_laws: NM IEC 60034-1 (IMANOR adoption — ratings, nameplate, and performance requirements)
NM IEC 60034-30-1 (IMANOR adoption — IE efficiency class marking)

summary.en: Chinese motors are typically labelled per GB 755-2019 (IEC 60034-1 equivalent) in Chinese, with nameplate data including 380 V, 50 Hz ratings. GB 18613-2020 requires efficiency grade marking on the nameplate. Chinese nameplates in Chinese language only are not directly suitable for Moroccan market use without updating voltage rating to 400 V and providing French or Arabic documentation where required.
summary.zh: 中国电动机通常按GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）以中文标注铭牌数据，包括380 V、50 Hz额定值。GB 18613-2020要求在铭牌上标注能效等级。仅有中文铭牌的中国电动机在摩洛哥市场使用时不合适，须将电压额定值更新为400 V并在需要时提供法语或阿拉伯语文件。
summary.zht: 中國電動機通常按GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）以中文標注銘牌數據，包括380 V、50 Hz額定值。GB 18613-2020要求在銘牌上標注能效等級。僅有中文銘牌的中國電動機在摩洛哥市場使用時不合適，須將電壓額定值更新為400 V並在需要時提供法語或阿拉伯語文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 755-2019 (IEC 60034-1 equivalent — CN domestic labelling standard)
GB 18613-2020 (efficiency grade marking on nameplate — CN domestic)

gap.en: Three concrete labelling gaps for Chinese motors exported to Morocco: (1) voltage rating on nameplate must show 400 V (not 380 V) for Morocco grid compliance; (2) documentation should be available in French or Arabic; (3) IE efficiency class per NM IEC 60034-30-1 should be clearly marked. Chinese standard labels referencing only GB standards and 380 V are not directly suitable for Morocco market placement without modification.
gap.zh: 中国电动机出口摩洛哥的三个具体标签差距：(1) 铭牌电压额定值须显示400 V（而非380 V）以符合摩洛哥电网规定；(2) 文件须提供法语或阿拉伯语版本；(3) 铭牌须按NM IEC 60034-30-1清晰标注IE效率等级。仅参照GB标准和380 V的中国标准铭牌，在未经修改的情况下不适合摩洛哥市场销售。
gap.zht: 中國電動機出口摩洛哥的三個具體標籤差距：(1) 銘牌電壓額定值須顯示400 V（而非380 V）以符合摩洛哥電網規定；(2) 文件須提供法語或阿拉伯語版本；(3) 銘牌須按NM IEC 60034-30-1清晰標注IE效率等級。僅參照GB標準和380 V的中國標準銘牌，在未經修改的情況下不適合摩洛哥市場銷售。

mandatory_status.target: NM IEC 60034-1 nameplate requirements apply; French or Arabic documentation expected for Moroccan market; 400 V, 50 Hz rating required; IE class marking per NM IEC 60034-30-1 expected
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN sale — GB 755 and GB 18613-2020 labelling; 380 V, 50 Hz rating; not directly suitable for Morocco without modification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors labelled only for the domestic Chinese market (380 V, Chinese language, GB standard references) are not directly suitable for Morocco market placement. Exporters must update voltage rating to 400 V, provide French or Arabic documentation, and ensure IE class is marked per NM IEC 60034-30-1. These labelling changes are required alongside the conformity route (CE DoC or IMANOR). This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅针对中国国内市场标注（380 V、中文、GB标准参考）的中国电动机不适合直接在摩洛哥市场销售。出口商须将电压额定值更新为400 V、提供法语或阿拉伯语文件，并确保按NM IEC 60034-30-1标注IE等级。这些标签变更须与合规路径（CE符合性声明或IMANOR）同步完成。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅針對中國國內市場標注（380 V、中文、GB標準參考）的中國電動機不適合直接在摩洛哥市場銷售。出口商須將電壓額定值更新為400 V、提供法語或阿拉伯語文件，並確保按NM IEC 60034-30-1標注IE等級。這些標籤變更須與合規路徑（CE符合性聲明或IMANOR）同步完成。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
